title: Spicy Fluffy Thai Avocado Hass Pulp Stir-fry
description: A spicy and fluffy Thai-inspired dish featuring avocado hass pulp in a pressure cooker for a solo-dinner experience. Nut-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: peanut butter
ingredients.amount: 2 tbsp (substitute with almond butter for nut-free)

instructions: Heat sesame seeds in a small pan until golden brown, then set aside.

In a blender or food processor, combine avocado h Ass pulp, chili flakes, soy sauce, lime juice, ginger paste, garlic paste, tamarind water, fish sauce, peanut butter (or almond butter), and salt. Blend until smooth.
Place the pressure cooker on high heat, add 1 cup of water, then pour in the blended mixture.
Close the lid securely and set the regulator to 'sealing'. Lock the valve for a manual cook at high pressure for about 3 minutes, or follow your pressure cooker's specific instructions.
After cooking is complete, allow it to naturally release pressure (manual method) for about 10 minutes before releasing any remaining steam manually. Stir in heated sesame seeds and serve hot.
